about: Sports medicine and performance training have converged to create a comprehensive approach to human physical potential, blending injury rehabilitation with strength training, biomechanical analysis, and nutritional optimization.
Cuong Strong is a sports medicine & performance provider serving the Sioux Falls, SD community.

Cuong Strong specializes in Personal Trainer, Fitness Coach, Personal Training, with additional expertise in Group Fitness, Weight Management, Fitness Goals. These specializations reflect a focused approach to care that allows Cuong Strong to deliver targeted, expert-level services to their patients. Each area of specialty represents dedicated training, clinical experience, and a commitment to staying current with the latest research and best practices in the field.

Recovery modalities including cryotherapy, compression therapy, infrared sauna, and sports massage are integrated into comprehensive training programs to optimize performance and minimize injury risk.

Sports medicine services include injury evaluation and treatment, biomechanical analysis, concussion management, performance training, sports-specific rehabilitation, dry needling, and return-to-sport testing.

Physical activity is one of the most powerful medicines available, reducing risk for heart disease, diabetes, cancer, and depression. Sports medicine professionals help individuals exercise safely and effectively at every fitness level.

Cuong Strong strives to create a comfortable, informative experience for every patient. From your first phone call to your initial appointment and beyond, the team emphasizes clear communication, respect for your time, and a genuine interest in helping you achieve your health and wellness goals. New patients are encouraged to bring any relevant health records and a list of current medications or supplements to their first visit.

To schedule an appointment or inquire about services, visit the Cuong Strong website or call their office directly. The team can provide information about accepted insurance plans, pricing, consultation fees, and appointment availability. Whether you are a new patient or returning for ongoing care, Cuong Strong is ready to support your health and wellness goals.

google.description: Kore Cares provides in-home care and caregiver matching across Sioux Falls and 38 counties in South Dakota.

practice.description: Kore Cares matches caregivers with clients across Sioux Falls and 38 counties in South Dakota. Founded by Marine veteran Clark Bevens. Featured on Episode 02 of the Dialed In Health podcast.
about: Kore Cares has been helping South Dakotans live safely at home for the past 10 years. Founded by Gabrielle Hoing, who spent more than two decades in geriatric care and helped build 11 private duty agencies across 8 states, Kore Cares brings deep expertise and compassionate service to families navigating one of life's biggest transitions.

What started as a mission to bring professional, trustworthy in-home care to South Dakota has grown into a statewide agency serving 43 counties and 111 cities. Whether your parent needs help after surgery, your family member is managing dementia, you're supporting a veteran, or you're not sure yet what level of care is needed, Kore Cares meets families where they are.

The team is built on three promises: trained, vetted caregivers who show up; transparent communication so families always know what's happening; and the flexibility to adjust care as life changes. Carly King, Agency Manager, and her team handle everything from initial assessment through ongoing coordination, so your family can focus on what matters.
Kore Cares is celebrating a decade of supporting South Dakotans. Join the team at open house events across the state to meet caregivers, ask questions, and enter raffles.

episode.title: A Marine, 22 Surgeries, and the Power of Asking for Help

about: Skin health is both a medical necessity and a confidence booster. Whether you're dealing with acne, eczema, psoriasis, or seeking cosmetic treatments like Botox and laser therapy, Sioux Falls dermatology providers have you covered.
Avera Dermatology is a dermatology & skin health provider serving the Sioux Falls, SD community.

Avera Dermatology specializes in Dermatologist, Dermatology, Skin Cancer Screening, with additional expertise in Acne, Eczema, Psoriasis. These specializations reflect a focused approach to care that allows Avera Dermatology to deliver targeted, expert-level services to their patients. Each area of specialty represents dedicated training, clinical experience, and a commitment to staying current with the latest research and best practices in the field.

Advanced aesthetic treatments now include neurotoxins (Botox, Dysport), dermal fillers, laser skin resurfacing, IPL photofacials, radiofrequency microneedling, and platelet-rich plasma (PRP) therapy for hair restoration and skin rejuvenation.
Medical dermatology focuses on diagnosing and treating conditions like melanoma, basal cell carcinoma, rosacea, dermatitis, and autoimmune skin disorders using the latest evidence-based protocols.

Skin cancer is the most common cancer in the United States, making regular dermatological screenings essential. Beyond cancer prevention, healthy skin contributes to self-confidence, comfort, and overall quality of life.

New patients at Avera Dermatology will find a professional, patient-centered environment designed to put you at ease from the moment you walk in. The team takes time to listen to your concerns, answer your questions, and explain recommended approaches to care. Whether this is your first visit to a dermatology & skin health provider or you're transitioning from another practice, Avera Dermatology is committed to making the experience as smooth and comfortable as possible.

Avera Dermatology welcomes new patients and encourages those interested in scheduling an appointment to reach out by phone or visit their website. Insurance coverage varies by provider and plan, so contacting Avera Dermatology directly is the best way to confirm accepted insurance, out-of-pocket costs, and scheduling availability. Many patients find that investing in quality dermatology & skin health care delivers lasting value for their health.

about: The brain is remarkably adaptable, and neurofeedback leverages this neuroplasticity to help patients optimize brain wave patterns associated with focus, calm, sleep, and emotional regulation — all without medication.

Treatment involves placing sensors on the scalp to measure brain wave activity while the patient watches a screen or listens to audio. The system provides real-time feedback that trains the brain to produce healthier patterns over time.

Unlike medication, neurofeedback addresses the underlying dysregulation rather than masking symptoms. Results are often long-lasting because the brain learns new patterns through operant conditioning.

Brain-based conditions affect millions of Americans, and many patients prefer drug-free approaches. Neurofeedback offers a scientifically validated alternative that can be used alone or alongside other treatments.

Emerging research shows HBOT benefits for neurological conditions, autoimmune disorders, Lyme disease, chronic fatigue syndrome, and age-related cognitive decline. Athletes use HBOT to accelerate recovery between training sessions.

Hard-shell hyperbaric chambers deliver treatments at 1.5-3.0 ATA (atmospheres absolute), providing significantly greater oxygen delivery than soft-shell or mild chambers, with protocols tailored to each patient's condition.

about: Whether recovering from surgery, managing a chronic condition, or rehabilitating after an injury, physical therapy provides the skilled guidance needed to restore function and return to the activities you love.

Acucare Physical Therapy Ltd is a physical therapy & rehabilitation provider serving the Sioux Falls, SD community. Located at 1700 S Minnesota Ave in Sioux Falls, they offer convenient access for patients throughout the area.

Acucare Physical Therapy Ltd specializes in Physical Therapist, Physical Therapy, Rehabilitation, with additional expertise in Back Pain, Knee Pain, Sports Injury. These specializations reflect a focused approach to care that allows Acucare Physical Therapy Ltd to deliver targeted, expert-level services to their patients. Each area of specialty represents dedicated training, clinical experience, and a commitment to staying current with the latest research and best practices in the field.

Manual therapy techniques used in physical therapy include joint mobilization, soft tissue mobilization, myofascial release, dry needling, instrument-assisted soft tissue mobilization (IASTM), and therapeutic taping.

Occupational therapy and speech therapy complement physical therapy by addressing fine motor skills, sensory processing, cognitive rehabilitation, swallowing disorders, and communication challenges in both children and adults.

Physical therapy is often the most effective treatment for musculoskeletal pain, with research showing outcomes equal to or better than surgery for many conditions. It's also essential for optimal post-surgical recovery.

New patients at Acucare Physical Therapy Ltd will find a professional, patient-centered environment designed to put you at ease from the moment you walk in.
